studio.name: KC Dance HQ
studio.pageTitle: KC Dance HQ Website Modernisation Study
studio.description: Two modernised homepage directions for KC Dance HQ, prepared for review.
studio.heading: KC Dance HQ, modernised.
studio.intro: Two directions that both modernise your current site rather than reinvent it. Same brand colours, same logo, same overall structure and photography style. Open each one to compare the feel, the typography, and the parent journey, then tell us which direction to take further.

templates.label: Demo 1
templates.title: Premium Minimalist
templates.description: A refined, whitespace-led modernisation on a neutral cream canvas, with your brand pink used as a deliberate accent. Built to feel calm, premium and trustworthy for parents researching seriously.
templates.source: Claude-generated modernisation study for KC Dance HQ, 2026-05-28

templates.label: Demo 2
templates.title: Warm Contemporary
templates.description: Keeps the warmth and energy of your current site, refreshed with a full-bleed photographic hero, contemporary card and grid patterns, modern motion and tighter typography. Emotive, but polished.
templates.source: Claude-generated modernisation study for KC Dance HQ, 2026-05-28
